semantics.public: Public HTTP route performing a real PostgreSQL readiness query without tenant scope.
semantics.authenticated-read: Authenticated and tenant-authorized route reading a tenant-owned row through RLS.
semantics.authenticated-write: Authenticated and tenant-authorized route inserting a tenant-owned row through RLS.
semantics.resource-authz: Authenticated route performing tenant authorization plus a real resource-scoped authorization decision before an RLS read.
semantics.idempotent-write: Authenticated route claiming and completing a PostgreSQL idempotency key in the business transaction.
semantics.async-enqueue: Authenticated route writing a transactional outbox event in the business transaction.

cache_definition.cold: Raw PostgreSQL authz store; every authorization decision executes store queries.
cache_definition.warm: Framework CachingStore primed once for every selected tenant before timing. PostgreSQL transaction and RLS setup remain enabled.
